ground_truth.description: Photo of classical street houses in San Francisco. San Francisco skyline visible including Transamerica Pyramid in the vast distance.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Photo of classical street houses in San Francisco (Victorian/Edwardian "Painted Ladies" style). You can see the San Francisco skyline, including Transamerica Pyramid in the vast distance. Also visible is Salesforce Tower in the distance. The photo is taken from Alamo Square area. It should be able to recognize San Francisco, even without metadata, because of the distinctive architecture along with a skyline in the background. Impressive if it can recognize specific buildings and the Transamerica Pyramid. Daytime, clear weather, summer.

details.description: Daytime panoramic view from a grassy hillside in Alamo Square Park looking east toward downtown San Francisco. In the foreground is the famous row of ornate, pastel-colored Victorian/Queen Anne houses with steep gables, bay windows, and elaborate wooden trim, fronted by a tree-lined street and a small crowd of park visitors on the lawn and path. Behind the houses, the San Francisco skyline rises under a clear blue sky: the triangular Transamerica Pyramid and the glassy Salesforce Tower are prominent, along with other mid- and high‑rise buildings. The distinctive white saddle‑roof form of the Cathedral of Saint Mary of the Assumption is visible left of center. Overall, the scene juxtaposes late‑19th‑century wooden residential architecture with modern high‑rise downtown structures.

details.description: A row of colorful Victorian houses known as the Painted Ladies lines a gentle slope at Alamo Square, San Francisco. Foreground shows a grassy park with a paved path and groups of people strolling and taking photos. The houses display ornate wood trim, bay windows, steep gabled roofs, and pastel colors (blue-gray, yellow, pink, beige). In the background, the downtown skyline rises, featuring the Transamerica Pyramid with its distinctive pointed silhouette and the tall Salesforce Tower to the right. The sky is clear and bright blue, suggesting mid-day sun, creating a contrast between historic residential architecture and modern skyscrapers.

details.description: A classic view of the famous 'Painted Ladies' row of Victorian houses, taken from the grassy slope of Alamo Square Park on a bright, sunny day. The foreground features a green lawn with a paved path where several people are walking or standing. In the mid-ground, the seven colorful Queen Anne-style Victorian homes line the street, featuring intricate architectural details, bay windows, and varying pastel hues including blue, green, and tan. Behind this historic row rises the modern skyline of downtown San Francisco. Prominent skyscrapers are clearly visible against the clear blue sky, including the Transamerica Pyramid, the massive Salesforce Tower, and the dark rectangular form of 555 California Street. To the left, the distinctive white saddle-roof of the Cathedral of Saint Mary of the Assumption stands out.

details.description: A wide-angle daytime shot from a grassy hill overlooking a row of colorful Victorian houses, known as the Painted Ladies, with the modern San Francisco skyline in the background. The sky is clear and blue. People are scattered across the lawn of the park in the foreground. Notable skyscrapers in the distance include the Salesforce Tower and the Transamerica Pyramid. The white, modern saddle-shaped roof of the Cathedral of Saint Mary of the Assumption is also visible in the mid-background.

entities.notes: Famous row of Victorian/Queen Anne houses on Steiner St facing Alamo Square; popularly photographed with the city skyline. Several built 1892–1896 (often attributed to builder Matthew Kavanaugh).

details.description: Classic postcard view from the lawn of Alamo Square Park looking east toward downtown San Francisco. In the foreground is the famous row of brightly painted Queen Anne–style Victorian houses known as the Painted Ladies (the Seven Sisters) with ornate woodwork, steep gables, and pastel facades. People are gathered on the grassy slope and paths of the park. Behind the houses rises the San Francisco skyline, clearly showing the triangular Transamerica Pyramid and the tall, rounded Salesforce Tower among other high‑rises. The white saddle‑roofed form of the Cathedral of Saint Mary of the Assumption is visible left of center. Clear daylight under a blue sky.

details.description: Foreground shows a row of pastel-painted Victorian houses known as the Painted Ladies along Alamo Square, with a grassy park in the foreground and a clear blue sky above. The houses feature steep gabled roofs, bay windows, and decorative trim, typical of late-19th-century Victorian architecture. In the distance, the San Francisco skyline rises with the iconic Transamerica Pyramid prominently visible, and Salesforce Tower also discernible on the right. People are strolling and standing along the park edge, indicating a popular city overlook.

details.description: A scenic daytime view taken from the grassy slope of Alamo Square Park, looking east towards the famous row of Victorian houses known as the Painted Ladies on Steiner Street. The foreground features a green lawn with scattered visitors walking and relaxing. In the mid-ground, the colorful Queen Anne-style homes (710–720 Steiner Street) stand in a neat row. The background is dominated by the modern San Francisco skyline under a clear blue sky, featuring prominent skyscrapers such as the Transamerica Pyramid, the Salesforce Tower, and the distinctive white saddle-roof shape of the Cathedral of Saint Mary of the Assumption.

details.description: A wide-angle daytime shot from a grassy hill looking towards a row of colorful Victorian houses with a modern city skyline in the background. The foreground shows the sloping lawn of a park with a paved walking path and several people scattered across the grass. The middle ground features the 'Painted Ladies,' a famous row of Queen Anne-style Victorian houses on Steiner Street, painted in various shades of blue, green, yellow, and brown. Behind these houses, the dense urban skyline of San Francisco is visible under a clear, bright blue sky. Key landmarks in the skyline include the Salesforce Tower, the Transamerica Pyramid, and the white, modernistic roof of the Cathedral of Saint Mary of the Assumption. The lighting is bright and direct, suggesting a clear day.

details.description: Daytime view from the grassy slope of Alamo Square Park looking east toward a famous row of pastel, highly ornamented Victorian/Queen Anne houses known as the Painted Ladies. People relax and walk on the lawn and path in the foreground. Beyond the row of gabled, bay‑windowed houses, San Francisco’s downtown skyline rises, including the narrow triangular Transamerica Pyramid and the rounded‑top glass Salesforce Tower among other high‑rises under a clear blue sky.
